name: Mountain Trekking
description: Conquer high-altitude Himalayan trails with jaw-dropping summit views and real physical challenge.
match_reason: Perfect for thrill-seekers who crave raw mountain adventure and breathtaking heights.

name: Paragliding
description: Soar above valleys and ridgelines on thermal winds for an unmatched bird's-eye rush.
match_reason: The ultimate adrenaline fix — feel the wind and see the world from an eagle's perspective.

name: River Rafting
description: Navigate churning white-water rapids on India's best Himalayan rivers with your crew.
match_reason: Equal parts terrifying and exhilarating — the rapids test your nerve and reward your courage.

name: Scuba Diving
description: Descend into a silent underwater world of coral gardens, reef fish, and sea turtles.
match_reason: An entirely different dimension of the world awaits — calm, colourful, and completely absorbing.

name: Wildlife Safari
description: Track tigers, leopards, and elephants through ancient forests on a jeep or elephant-back safari.
match_reason: The heart-pounding suspense of spotting a wild tiger is unlike anything else on Earth.

name: Yoga & Meditation Retreat
description: Reconnect with yourself through guided yoga, breathwork, and silent meditation in nature.
match_reason: When the mind is racing, only stillness can bring you back to yourself.

name: Beach Camping
description: Sleep under the stars on a secluded beach with the sound of waves as your lullaby.
match_reason: Simple, magical, and restorative — the best reset button nature has to offer.

name: Cultural City Tour
description: Explore ancient temples, bustling bazaars, street food lanes, and living heritage on foot.
match_reason: Every street corner holds a story — cities are history you can walk through.

name: Heritage Walk
description: Guided walks through old quarters, ruins, and monument trails with expert storytelling.
match_reason: The best way to absorb centuries of history is on foot, one lane at a time.

name: Ayurveda & Spa Retreat
description: Kerala's ancient healing tradition — herbal oils, detox therapies, and total body reset.
match_reason: Ancient wisdom, skilled hands, and quiet gardens combine to melt stress away completely.

name: Houseboat Cruise
description: Drift through Kerala's backwaters on a traditional kettuvallam with your own cook and crew.
match_reason: Time slows down beautifully when you're gliding through green canals with nowhere to be.

name: Bungee Jumping
description: Take the 83-meter leap at Rishikesh — India's highest bungee jump with Ganges views.
match_reason: Face your fears at the edge of a cliff — the freefall lasts seconds but the feeling lasts forever.

name: Stargazing Camp
description: Set up camp under India's darkest skies in Ladakh or Rajasthan for a galaxy-filled night.
match_reason: Few things shift perspective like lying under millions of stars in absolute silence.

name: Food & Culinary Tour
description: Eat your way through local markets, street stalls, and chef-guided cooking classes.
match_reason: Food is the most honest window into a culture — and the most delicious adventure.

name: Photography Expedition
description: Chase golden hour, wildlife, landscapes, and people stories through your lens on guided photo walks.
match_reason: A camera transforms a trip into a visual story — every frame is a memory preserved.

name: Desert Camel Safari
description: Ride double-humped camels across sand dunes and sleep under Rajasthan's spectacular star canopy.
match_reason: There's no more cinematic way to feel small and free than atop a camel at dusk.

name: Snowboarding & Skiing
description: Carve fresh powder at Auli or Manali on India's finest ski slopes with lessons available.
match_reason: The mountain becomes your playground when you're gliding down fresh powder at speed.

name: Sunset Boat Ride
description: Float on still waters as the sky turns gold and pink — the most peaceful hour of any day.
match_reason: Nothing punctuates a beautiful day more perfectly than watching the sun disappear into water.

name: Monastery Circuit
description: Visit ancient Tibetan Buddhist monasteries perched on cliffs — prayer flags, butter lamps, and deep silence.
match_reason: The monks have been praying for centuries — their peace is contagious.

name: Jungle Trek
description: Push through dense forest trails tracking wildlife signs, bird calls, and hidden waterfalls.
match_reason: Every sound is an animal, every shadow a potential sighting — the forest keeps you completely present.

name: Cycling Tour
description: Pedal through villages, paddy fields, plantation paths, and ancient town lanes at your own pace.
match_reason: Two wheels open up a world that cars and feet miss — slow enough to see, fast enough to cover ground.

name: Snorkeling
description: Mask up and drop into a shallow reef world teeming with electric fish and living coral.
match_reason: You don't need to go deep to be amazed — the world just below the surface is electric.

name: Rock Climbing
description: Scale natural rock faces or bouldering problems in places like Hampi, Badami, or Ladakh.
match_reason: Every move demands total focus — climbing is meditation with muscles.

name: Craft & Art Workshop
description: Learn pottery, block printing, weaving, or miniature painting from local artisan masters.
match_reason: Making something with your hands in an ancient tradition reconnects you with something very real.

name: Sunrise Hike
description: Rise before dawn and reach a ridge or peak just as the sun paints the Himalayas golden.
match_reason: No alarm is easier to answer than the one promising a sunrise above the clouds.

name: Ganga Aarti Experience
description: Join thousands on the ghats as priests perform the mesmerizing fire ritual on the holy Ganges at dusk.
match_reason: The ancient rhythms of fire, bells, and river will move something deep inside you.

name: Plantation Walk & Tea Tasting
description: Walk through rows of bright-green tea or coffee plants, then taste the morning's fresh brew.
match_reason: Slow travel at its finest — knowing where your cup of tea comes from changes every sip.

name: White Water Kayaking
description: Navigate river rapids solo in a kayak for a more intimate and intense water adventure.
match_reason: Just you, a paddle, and a river that demands everything you've got.

name: Village Homestay Experience
description: Live with a local family, cook together, work the fields, and see rural India from the inside.
match_reason: Hospitality, simplicity, and authenticity you simply cannot book at a hotel.

name: Night Jeep Safari
description: Track nocturnal wildlife under headlights — leopards, civets, and nightjars emerge after dark.
match_reason: The forest transforms after dark — what prowls out is spectacular and completely unpredictable.
